basic_details.job_title: Bank of Baroda Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for VP, DVP Posts
basic_details.short_information: This table summarizes the five posts notified by Bank of Baroda along with the application timeline, so candidates can quickly check which role and deadline applies to them. The Bank has clarified that it may modify the number of vacancies depending on its requirement, so the final number of posts filled could change.

application_fee.details: Candidates often want to know the cost of applying before starting their application. For this recruitment, Bank of Baroda has kept the process completely free. | The application fee is Nil for all categories of candidates applying for these 5 IT positions.

qualification.details: Eligibility for these IT leadership roles is assessed as on the cut-off date, and the Bank has linked position-specific qualification and experience details separately for each post rather than listing them within the main notification. | The detailed educational qualification and work experience criteria for each of the 5 posts - VP Head-AI, VP Head Platform Engineering, DVP Dy. Head Cloud CoE, DVP Dy. Head IT Infrastructure, and DVP Dy. Head Platform Engineering - are provided through separate position-specific links on the Bank's official notification, since each senior IT role has its own distinct skill and experience requirements. | Eligibility is reckoned as on the cut-off date of 01-06-2026. Post-qualification experience of less than six months in any organization as on 01-06-2026 will not be counted toward eligibility, unless that experience is part of the candidate's current employment. Candidates must be a Citizen of India, or fall under specific categories such as a subject of Nepal or Bhutan, a Tibetan refugee who settled in India before 1 January 1962, or a person of Indian origin who migrated from select countries with the intention of permanently settling in India. OBC candidates falling under the "creamy layer" are not entitled to OBC reservation or age relaxation and must apply under the General category.

salary_details.details: Salary for these roles is not fixed on a standard pay scale, unlike typical government recruitment. This section explains how pay is determined and where selected candidates will be posted. | Remuneration will be offered based on the candidate's qualifications, experience, overall suitability, last drawn salary, and market benchmark - there is no fixed pay scale mentioned in the notification. The location of posting is Mumbai or Hyderabad, though selected candidates remain liable for transfer anywhere in India as per the Bank's requirement.

selection_process: Selection for these IT leadership posts goes beyond a standard written exam
with the Bank assessing multiple professional parameters. No fixed exam date or selection timeline has been announced in the notification.
The selection process may include an online test
or any other test the Bank deems suitable
followed by an Interview or multiple interviews. The Bank may shortlist applications based on criteria such as suitability for the role
and exposure to regulatory or compliance frameworks. The minimum qualifying mark for the Personal Interview (PI) is 60% for UR category and 55% for Reserved category candidates.
how_to_apply: Applications for these posts can only be submitted online, with no other mode accepted. Here is the step-by-step process candidates need to follow.
Visit the Bank's official website and go to the Career section → Current Opportunities page.
Register online using the application format enabled for this recruitment.
Fill in the online application form carefully, since no changes are allowed after clicking SUBMIT.
Upload your Bio-data, scanned photograph, signature, and supporting eligibility documents as per the prescribed specifications.
Verify all entered details, including name, category, date of birth, and post applied for, before final submission.
Submit the application well before 10-07-2026 to avoid last-minute website load issues.
Save the acknowledgement number generated on the portal and check your registered email for confirmation - registration is complete only once this acknowledgement is received.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Bank of Baroda IT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of the online application is 10-07-2026. Online registration started on 20-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are 5 vacancies in total - one each for VP Head-AI, VP Head Platform Engineering, DVP Dy. Head Cloud CoE, DVP Dy. Head IT Infrastructure, and DVP Dy. Head Platform Engineering.

faq.question: Q3. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, the application fee is Nil for all candidates.

faq.question: Q4. Is this a permanent job at Bank of Baroda?
faq.answer: No, this is a Fixed Term Employment for an initial 3 years, extendable by a maximum of 2 additional years at the Bank's discretion, subject to satisfactory performance.

faq.question: Q5. Is a minimum CIBIL score required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must have a minimum CIBIL score of 680 or above at the time of joining, along with a satisfactory credit history.

faq.question: Q6. Where will selected candidates be posted?
faq.answer: The location of posting is Mumbai or Hyderabad, though selected candidates are liable for transfer anywhere in India as per the Bank's requirement.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: Selection may include an online test, a psychometric test, or any other suitable test, followed by an interview. The minimum qualifying mark for the interview is 60% for UR category and 55% for Reserved category candidates.

faq.question: Q8. How can candidates apply for Bank of Baroda IT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply online through www.bankofbaroda.bank.in under the Career section → Current Opportunities. No other mode of application is accepted.

faq.question: Q9. Is a Ration Card accepted as identity proof for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, a Ration Card will not be accepted as valid identity proof for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the cut-off date for determining eligibility?
faq.answer: Eligibility for all positions is determined as on 01-06-2026.

faq.answer: The last date for submission of the online application is 10-07-2026. Online registration started on 20-06-2026.
